title: Tamil Nadu floor test LIVE updates: Vijay wins floor test with 144 votes after AIADMK's split-vote
description: Tamil Nadu floor test LIVE updates: Aided by AIADMK's split-voting, TVK chief Vijay won the high-stakes floor test in state assembly on Wednesday with 144 votes. Vijay took oath as chief minister on Sunday, days after his party won 108 seats in state elections, 10 short of the majority mark of 118.
